title: Fix contact info: update region to Île-de-France, restore email, phone, and address

requirements.text: Update all occurrences of the region 'Occitanie' to 'Île-de-France' across all frontend components (Navigation, Hero, Footer, Contact, About, ServiceAreas, Testimonials, and any other component that references the region).

quotes: je suis pas en occitanie je suis en ils de france

acceptanceCriteria: ServiceAreas component lists communes relevant to Île-de-France (or at minimum removes Occitanie references)

requirements.text: Restore the company email address in the Contact section (Contact.tsx), Footer (Footer.tsx), and any other component where it was previously displayed but is now missing. Use the canonical email for Verdier Couverture.

quotes: il n'y a plus l'adresse mail

acceptanceCriteria: A visible email address is rendered in the Contact section
A visible email address is rendered in the Footer
The email is clickable as a mailto link

requirements.text: Restore the company phone number in the Contact section (Contact.tsx), Navigation (Navigation.tsx), Hero (Hero.tsx), Footer (Footer.tsx), and any other component where it was previously displayed but is now missing.
acceptanceCriteria: A visible phone number is rendered in the Navigation bar
A visible phone number is rendered in the Hero quick-contact links
A visible phone number is rendered in the Contact section
A visible phone number is rendered in the Footer
The phone number is clickable as a tel: link

requirements.text: Restore the company physical address in the Contact section (Contact.tsx) and Footer (Footer.tsx), and any other component where it was previously displayed but is now missing. The address must reflect an Île-de-France location.
acceptanceCriteria: A visible physical address is rendered in the Contact section
A visible physical address is rendered in the Footer
The address reflects an Île-de-France location (not Occitanie)

constraints: Do not modify any file under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Do not alter the overall page layout or visual design
nonGoals: Redesigning the UI theme or color scheme
